channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Of course we look for ourselves in art — but if we stop there, we're missing out
item.description: As I watched the new series, I only cared about Piggy — the thoughtful, smart kid stranded on an island with other boys. That made me think about what we look for in art.
item.content:encoded:
Lord of the Flies adaptation.'/>

As I watched the new series, I only cared about Piggy — the thoughtful, smart kid stranded on an island with other boys. That made me think about what we look for in art.

(Image credit: J Redza)
item.dc:creator: Glen Weldon

item.title: Sunday Puzzle: Words in a country
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WAMU listener Russell Weeden and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WAMU listener Russell Weeden and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.dc:creator: Will Shortz

item.title: Gas, groceries and getting by: How voters in one Ohio district see affordability
item.description: Ohio voters headed to the polls last week for primary elections, and in competitive districts like the one where Toledo is primarily located, the message was clear: affordability is a top priority.
item.content:encoded: Ohio voters headed to the polls last week for primary elections, and in competitive districts like the one where Toledo is primarily located, the message was clear: affordability is a top priority.
item.dc:creator: Catie Dull

item.title: Protests and boycotts rock prestigious Venice Biennale
item.description: The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.
item.content:encoded:
The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.

(Image credit: Luca Bruno)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: 'Wait Wait' for May 9. 2026: With Not My Job guest Bobby Lopez
item.description: This week, Wait Wait is live in Chicago with host Peter Sagal, special guest Bobby Lopez and panelists Hari Kondabolu, Roxanne Roberts, and Mo Rocca
item.content:encoded:
This week, Wait Wait is live in Chicago with host Peter Sagal, special guest Bobby Lopez and panelists Hari Kondabolu, Roxanne Roberts, and Mo Rocca

(Image credit: Kevork Djansezian)

item.title: Ode to motherhood
item.description: For Mother's Day, we bring to you a consideration of motherhood by a poet who's brought up two sons.
item.content:encoded: For Mother's Day, we bring to you a consideration of motherhood by a poet who's brought up two sons.
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby

item.title: ABC argues Trump administration is trying to chill free speech
item.description: In a filing, ABC accuses the Trump administration of trying to chill its constitutionally protected free speech. The point of contention: "The View," and whether it's subject to equal time rules.
item.content:encoded:
In a filing, ABC accuses the Trump administration of trying to chill its constitutionally protected free speech. The point of contention: "The View," and whether it's subject to equal time rules.

(Image credit: Gabriela Passos)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: 'Blue Film' is a disquieting sit for both characters and audience
item.description: Blue Film is clearly designed to be unsettling. Its performances are haunting.
item.content:encoded:
Blue Film is clearly designed to be unsettling. Its performances are haunting.

(Image credit: Obscured Pictures)
item.dc:creator: Bob Mondello

item.title: 'Hamilton' producer Jeffrey Seller traces his journey from 'Theater Kid' to Broadway
item.description: Seller has been a key behind-the-scenes figure for some of Broadway's biggest hits including, Hamilton and Rent, but he got his start on a much smaller scale. Originally broadcast June 30, 2025.
item.content:encoded: Seller has been a key behind-the-scenes figure for some of Broadway's biggest hits including, Hamilton and Rent, but he got his start on a much smaller scale. Originally broadcast June 30, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: Rooted in nature, 'Silent Friend' will change the way you see the trees
item.description: A new art-house drama tells three stories that span the century — and connect to one tree. Silent Friend will open your eyes to the beauty of the natural world.
item.content:encoded:
A new art-house drama tells three stories that span the century — and connect to one tree. Silent Friend will open your eyes to the beauty of the natural world.

(Image credit: Lena Kettner)
item.dc:creator: Justin Chang
